decisions.rationale: IR re-read via refs.json confirms bTItY (RG - PathEnrollment) lives under FG-services bTItS/bTItX floating-bar subtree (/pages/bTHDg/elements/bTItX/elements/bTItd), not the My Paths grid. EnrollmentFloatingBar correctly marks bTItY on the horizontal RepeatingGroup_list_ strip; PathsGridPanel outer wrapper also emits bTItY while the inner grid already carries ai_RNbBHYHn (PATHS_GRID_RG_BUBBLE_ID). Valid parity-tooling finding — duplicate selector prevents uniquely targeting the floating-bar RG — but PATHS-06 AC-2 is satisfied on EnrollmentFloatingBar, criteria_audit/ui_evidence for bTItS/bTItY/FG-services pass, and PATHS-07 depends_on store currentSessionId from pathsEnrollmentStore (FV-3/FV-5 pass), not unique DOM ids. One-line removal of bTItY from PathsGridPanel outer wrapper is optional PATHS-02/PATHS-06 marker cleanup mirroring DASH-06 C-1 duplicate slot-wrapper deferral; no rewrite gate required for advance.

Empty-state label "No enrolled paths yet" in EnrollmentFloatingBar is ad-hoc compact-strip copy not resolved from bTHDg slice static text. IR-grounded empty copy bTJEI ("You haven't enrolled in any path yet") is already centralized in routes.ts and used on PathsGridPanel zero-enrollment grid state (PATHS-02). Floating-bar RG empty cell is a distinct compact chip placeholder with no enumerated static text id in PATHS-06 ui_refs[] or ACs; decompose scope focuses on pathenrollment1 listing, selection, and store contract for PATHS-07. Defer IR-sourced empty-cell copy to a polish pass when bTItX subtree text nodes are enumerated.

Floating-bar enrollment cells use compact chip layout (Route icon + title + status) without per-cell Bubble ids from bTHDg slice. Decompose MOD-DRSAM-PATHS explicitly notes PATHS-06 cell layout ids deferred to IR slice enumeration; decompose review C-7 gap cites same deferral. Named ui_refs bTItS/bTItY/FG-services and ui_evidence pass; functional_audit FV-1/FV-2 pass for load and selection. Per-cell data-bubble-id markers are optional parity-tooling follow-up when cell ids are added to decompose ui_refs — does not block PATHS-07 session URL matching against store enrollment list.

Valid coverage-artifact traceability gap: pathsEnrollmentApi.ts re-exports fetchPathEnrollments from dashboard pathEnrollmentApi while enrollInPath/unenrollFromPath helpers are primarily exercised by PATHS-03-path-detail-enrollment-popup; PATHS-06 coverage files_changed lists the module but does not document cross-item API surface split. criteria_audit AC-2/AC-3 and functional checks pass at 100%; shared list shape satisfies ai_RNbBHYHn GetElement parity. Defer documenting enroll/unenroll ownership in PATHS-03 coverage or expanding PATHS-06 files_changed notes on next coverage pass — artifact hygiene only, no source rewrite required.

summary: 0 fix_now, 4 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs and ui_evidence pass. Deferred: C-1 duplicate bTItY on PathsGridPanel outer wrapper (optional PATHS-02/PATHS-06 marker cleanup, ai_RNbBHYHn already correct); C-2 floating-bar empty-cell copy IR grounding; C-3 per-cell bubble-id markers when IR cell ids enumerated; C-4 pathsEnrollmentApi cross-item coverage traceability to PATHS-03.
